title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have warned about accelerating AI self-improvement trends, with Claude increasingly writing code, reviewing code, running experiments, and assisting in AI development. The concern centers on AI systems beginning to participate directly in their own improvement cycle, with humans setting goals but AI handling execution.
